Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: Explicitly covers "綠建築、智慧建築價值" (Green building, smart building value), which directly relates to improving energy efficiency (Target 7.3) and promoting clean energy technologies.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Focus on "綠建築、智慧建築價值" (Green building, smart building value) directly supports upgrading infrastructure to be sustainable and adopting clean technologies (Target 9.4).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Core relevance through "綠建築、智慧建築價值" (Green building, smart building value), addressing sustainable buildings (Target 11.c) and reducing cities' environmental impact (Target 11.6).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The topic "綠建築" (Green building) promotes sustainable management of resources (Target 12.2) and encourages companies to adopt sustainable practices by valuing them (Target 12.6).

Climate Action.reason: The valuation of "綠建築" (Green building) incentivizes energy efficiency, a key climate change mitigation measure, linking to Target 13.2 (integrate climate change measures).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The topic "估價行為規範與研究" (Code of conduct and research) supports developing accountable institutions (Target 16.6) and reducing corruption in real estate (Target 16.5).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course uses international literature and standards like "各國估價基準" (valuation standards of various countries), promoting knowledge sharing and policy coherence (Targets 17.6, 17.14).
